texto: And the thing about me is, I have a lot of mellow songs, because they're the easiest for me to write. I wanted to try to make some more upbeat songs, so, I ended up gravitating toward writing songs with friends, which was a great learning process, and also we came up with great songs. Those are the songs that came out the most naturally.
explicacao: Citação de Priscilla Ahn sobre temas ligados a amizade. “And the thing about me is, I have a lot of mellow songs, because they're the easiest for me to wr…” articula amizade, friends, great em registro de amizade, com relevância para contextos como termino e great.

frase_original: And the thing about me is, I have a lot of mellow songs, because they're the easiest for me to write. I wanted to try to make some more upbeat songs, so, I ended up gravitating toward writing songs with friends, which was a great learning process, and also we came up with great songs. Those are the songs that came out the most naturally.
